heading: Authorization of protection operations for the Secretary of Agriculture and others
label: 2279k Authorization of protection operations for the Secretary of Agriculture and others
notes: Definition of “Secretary”“Secretary” means the Secretary of Agriculture, see , set out as a note under .section 2 of Pub. L. 115–334section 9001 of this title

children.text: protection for the Secretary and the Deputy Secretary during the performance of official duties by each such officer and during any activity that is preliminary or postliminary to the performance of official duties by each such officer;

protection, incidental to the protection provided pursuant to paragraph (1), to an individual accompanying each such officer who is participating in an activity or event relating to the official duties of each such officer when there is an articulable threat to such individual;

continuous protection to the Secretary and Deputy Secretary (including during periods not described in paragraph (1)) if there is an articulable threat of physical harm, in accordance with guidelines established by the Secretary; and

protection of another senior officer representing the Secretary (including a person nominated to be the Secretary during the pendency of such nomination) if there is an articulable threat of physical harm, in accordance with guidelines established by the Secretary.

children.heading: Authorities of the protective operation
children.label: b Authorities of the protective operation
B
children.text: to conduct criminal investigations into potential threats to the security of persons protected under this section;

children.label: C
children.text: to make arrests without a warrant for any offense against the United States committed in the presence of such officer or special agent;

children.label: D
children.text: to perform protective intelligence work, including identifying and mitigating potential threats and conducting advance work to review security matters relating to sites and events; and

children.label: E
children.text: to coordinate with local law enforcement agencies.

children.label: A
children.text: guidelines issued by the Attorney General; and

children.label: B
children.text: such additional guidelines as may be issued by the Secretary.

children.heading: Exception
children.label: c Exception
children.text: The authorities granted under this section may be exercised notwithstanding .section 1343(b)(1) of title 31

children.heading: Report
children.label: d Report
children.text: Not later than , and each September 30 through 2024, the Secretary shall provide to the Committee on Agriculture of the House of Representatives and Committee on Agriculture, Nutrition, and Forestry of the Senate a report describing the protection provided, and accounting for the expenditures made, pursuant to this section.September 30, 2019
